ai_result.title: Dundalk: Saturday Morning Pre-Party Paddle
ai_result.summary: Join Michelle and Rob for a laid-back, beginner-friendly paddle around Dundalk at a slow-moderate pace.

ai_result.title: Dundalk: Going Away Party for Ray & Allen
ai_result.summary: Farewell celebration for the club's President and Treasurer on the water at Hard Yacht Cafe.

ai_result.title: BMore Peninsula: Intermediate-level paddle to Nick's Fish House
ai_result.summary: Join Colleen for a paddle brunch to Nick's Fish House, departing from the Baltimore Peninsula dock.

ai_result.title: Solleys Cove: Ghost Ships and Brunch
ai_result.summary: A 5-mile paddle to see ghost ships and enjoy brunch at Ramshead Dockside.

ai_result.title: Fells Point: Kayak availability may be limited
ai_result.summary: New-member orientation will use club kayaks, limiting availability for other members.

ai_result.title: Delta: Paddle Pals
ai_result.summary: Explore the Conowingo Islands & Muddy Creek with Ricardo S. Expect an exploratory pace and distance between 5 – 8 miles.

ai_result.title: Dundalk: Taco Tuesday Paddle
ai_result.summary: Join Michelle for a laid-back paddle around Dundalk with a beginner-friendly pace, followed by Taco Tuesday at The Hard Yacht Café.

ai_result.title: Delta: Rescue Training
ai_result.summary: Learn and practice rescue skills such as wet exit, partner rescue, self-rescue, and emptying a kayak.

ai_result.title: Havre de Grace: Paddle to the Lighthouse
ai_result.summary: Explore Havre de Grace's open water and scenic views with Michelle.
